L1.description: RIGHT x4, RECORD, DOWN x7, RIGHT x5. Clone replays path to activate trigger.

L2.blocker: BFS replay-from-scratch too slow (46/s). Needs abstract model with clone+trigger state. 5 actions, solution depth >46.

abstract_model.mechanics: RECORD saves path and creates clone. Clone replays in lockstep. Triggers retract claws when occupied.
